code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut total = 0
mut current = 0
mut have = false
mut done = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  mut b = -1
  if i < n
    b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
  end

  let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57

  if is_digit
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    have = true
  else
    if have and not done
      if total + current > 100
        done = true
      else
        total = total + current
      end
    end
    current = 0
    have = false
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("total=#{total}")
